##### WHY ONE-WAY INTERVIEWS?

## See beyond the resume.

Conduct structured, one-way interviews to assess candidates more efficiently and ethically.

### Evaluate Job Fit More Effectively

Including video assessment interview questions in assessments enables you to evaluate the entire candidate, not just skills and experience.

### Discover Overlooked Talent

By asking candidates to provide a video “resume” you may uncover valuable skills and experience that would be an asset to your organization.

### Evaluate Verbal Communication

If a job requires extensive customer contact, you can evaluate candidates’ verbal communication skills for English and other languages.

Icons of translation, rating speedometer, puzzle pieces, video camera, and screen sharing symbols on blue squares.

### Assess Verbal Problem Solving

Video assessment interview questions allow you to present candidates with common situations they would encounter on the job to evaluate their problem-solving skills.

### Streamline Group Interviews

Allow hiring managers and entire hiring teams to rate applicants’ responses from 1 to 10 stars based on scoring criteria you establish.

### Match Candidate Likeness

Video assessments help verify the candidate throughout the interview process by matching the test taker to the interviewee.

##### THE PROCESS

## Here's how one-way interviews work.

From why to how, here's the breakdown on where one-way interview fit into the hiring process.

## **Too many interviews, not enough time**

Interviewing qualified candidates can be time-intensive. 
Let candidates answer questions on their 
own time, and review them on yours. Send your 
questions, and let candidates respond with video 
and audio, whenever is most convenient for them.

Interface for adding video/audio response to sales pitch with options for difficulty, limits, scoring, and recording.

eSkill interface with menu options and columns for subject name, topic, description, type, and difficulty.

## **Structured interview questions for fair evaluation**

Unstructured, unfocused interviews lead to 
subjective evaluations and poor hires. By asking 
the same questions to each candidate, you can 
accurately assess their responses and make more 
qualified decisions.

## **Get everyone’s feedback 
with team grading**

Share the interview responses with your colleagues 
and let them grade the interview independently — 
giving you wide-ranging feedback from your entire 
hiring team.

Profile of Mia Hueter with sales manager assessment scores and positive recruitment team reviews and star ratings.

Three question blocks: Video interview, drag organs on body diagram, and multiple-choice word puzzle.

## **Pair it with pre-hire testing for a complete candidate analysis**

eSkill’s one-way interviews work seamlessly with 
our pre-hire assessments. Conduct interviews, 
assess skills, understand behavioral types — all 
within the same platform.

##### WHY ESKILL?

## A better experience for employers & candidates.

eSkill's video response questions create a more engaging, interactive pre-employment assessment experience that helps you identify top talent faster.

### Soft Skill Insights

Gain deeper insights into verbal skills, personality, and problem-solving ability before scheduling interviews.

### Faster, More Efficient Hiring

Cut time-to-hire by eliminating unnecessary screening calls and allowing hiring teams to evaluate candidates on their own schedule.

### Customizable For Any Industry

Whether you’re hiring for customer service, healthcare sales, or executive roles, eSkill's talent assessments can be customized to fit your needs.

"We utilize eSkill to determine a candidate's capability that may not have the direct experience listed on their resume. This tool is very useful for Hiring Managers who may need some convincing to pull the trigger. The software is user-friendly, and customer service is very responsive."

AdventHealth

Endless possibilities but easy to use. Endless combinations of testing/simulations content stays current and spans across so many disciplines. Was able to truly see candidate knowledge concerning specific disciplines and their ability to successfully get the job done.

As our company really started to grow in size, we started to notice the pains from hiring managers about the quality of candidates and recent hires. There was pressure to fill open roles as quickly as possible. Once we started to use eSkill, we saw improved confidence when hiring and more qualified employees. Our managers were on board with using eSkill, mainly because we were able to work together to create specific assessments. We have not looked back since!

We chose eSkill because it meets and exceeds our needs. eSkill is unmatched in its ability to manage franchise locations, customize and configure tests, and customer service. We would recommend eSkill to anyone who is looking to identify skilled candidates.

AtWork

“eSkill helped us complete the circle in our hiring and screening process by providing a simple-to-use testing platform. This platform set the perfect stage to verify skills and abilities for applicants ranging from entry level customer service to senior level software engineers. Our hiring managers have been very pleased with the variety of standard tests available, along with our ability to create and post our own tests. This system has literally saved us hundreds of working hours.”

1-800 Contacts

“The testing went great! We loved the ability to create our own test from a bank of existing questions. It was a key part of our search process and we found an excellent candidate. As I said, we don’t do searches for technical positions very often, but when we do, eSkill testing will always be a part of it.”

University of Maryland

"eSkill assessments are the only way we can validate the candidates’ skill level. eSkill has been a good tool for us overall and as far as I know is very user friendly. We use it as a selling point to clients that we thoroughly vet our candidates before they are sent out for either interviews or placements."

Judy Contreras
